patterns.value: Vite 6 + React 18 + @tailwindcss/vite (no tailwind.config.ts needed) + tw-animate-css builds cleanly; @import 'tailwindcss' source(none) with @source glob is the correct Tailwind v4 pattern
Use 'motion/react' not 'framer-motion' for Framer Motion v12+ with React; AnimatePresence also from 'motion/react'
When placing supabase/info.tsx inside src/utils/ vs project root utils/, update relative import paths in components accordingly (../../utils vs ../../../utils)
Warm cream-brown palette works best with CSS radial gradient blobs at 12-18% opacity; floating bean shapes use border-radius 50%/60%60%40%40% + ::after pseudo-element for the groove line
data-category tabs + JS renderMenu() with staggered transition-delay on cards is clean pattern for single-file HTML; observer re-attachment needed after innerHTML replacement
mousemove parallax on blobs: divide delta by window size, multiply by 20, apply to transform translate. Guard with window.innerWidth check for mobile.
Black #0a0a0a + neon lime #c8ff00 + dark grey #1a1a1a — high contrast, raw aesthetic. Avoid pastels or purple gradients for fitness/sport brands.
clip-path polygon(0 40px, 100% 0, 100% calc(100% - 40px), 0 100%) creates diagonal cuts between sections — use margin: -2px to avoid gaps
IntersectionObserver + requestAnimationFrame with ease-out cubic (1 - (1-t)^3) for number counters — start on section enter with countersStarted flag
cursor:none on body breaks touch devices and low-vision users — wrap in @media (pointer:fine) and mirror in JS with matchMedia check
#52525C on dark backgrounds fails WCAG AA (2.6:1). Minimum accessible muted on #06060A is #7A7A88 (4.6:1). Always verify contrast before using muted palette tokens.

Hidden nav ul with display:none on mobile without a burger toggle JS is a critical mobile navigation failure — always pair with toggle button + aria-expanded + close-on-link-click + Escape key handler

Horror/atmospheric sites use heavy animations (grain, fog, glitch, flicker). Always add @media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce) block + JS check before registering IntersectionObserver and setInterval effects
Footer/CTA links that look like placeholders (href='#') should be given real URLs or clearly marked. All real external links need target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
